name: Workspace Doctor
short_description: Find the real blocker, catalog freshness, overlap map, and next repo-native command fast.
audience: Developers working across repo apps and skills
Maintainers checking build, catalog, and setup readiness
detail_lines: Checks repo markers, common CLIs, Xcode readiness, generated catalog freshness, and repo-native runner paths before deeper edits.
Ranks likely blockers as machine, environment, dependency, or code issues so the next action is concrete.
Surfaces bundled app and skill overlap in this repo to reduce duplicate work and point Codex at the right local command.
